I found the matching $499 Employee Labs Opportunity (006Ql00000dg4QYIAY). The good news is it's already marked `Closed Lost`, which means it will not count against the employee's credit balance per our system rules. No ticket or credit adjustment is needed from the employee's end. The Opportunity is already properly excluded from credit calculations.
I will update this issue as resolved but if you have any questions, please let me know!
